ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_freedom" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "fiscal_freedom" REAL /* Fiscal freedom score */,
  "business_freedom" REAL /* Business freedom score */,
  "labor_freedom" REAL /* Labor freedom score */,
  "monetary_freedom" REAL /* Monetary freedom score */,
  "trade_freedom" REAL /* Trade freedom score */,
  "investment_freedom" REAL /* Investment freedom score */,
  "financial_freedom" REAL /* Financial freedom score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "property_rights" REAL /* Property rights score */,
  "judicial_effectiveness" REAL /* Judicial effectiveness score */,
  "tax_burden" REAL /* Tax burden score */,
  "government_spending" REAL /* Government spending score */,
  "fiscal_health" REAL /* Fiscal health score */,
  "tariffs" REAL /* Tariffs score */,
  "black_market_premium" REAL /* Black market premium score */,
  "maturity_of_financial_system" REAL /* Maturity of financial system score */,
  "credit_availability" REAL /* Credit availability score */,
  "equity_market_regulations" REAL /* Equity market regulations score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "conflicts" INTEGER /* Number of conflicts */,
  "security_safety" INTEGER /* Security and safety score */,
  "domestic_movement" INTEGER /* Domestic movement score */,
  "foreign_movement" INTEGER /* Foreign movement score */,
  "religion" INTEGER /* Religion score */,
  "establishing_operating_political_parties" INTEGER /* Score for establishing and operating political parties */,
  "operating_educational" INTEGER /* Score for operating educational institutions */,
  "political_pressures_controls_media_content" INTEGER /* Score for political pressures and controls on media content */,
  "parental_authority_in_marriage" INTEGER /* Score for parental authority in marriage */,
  "transfers_subsidies" REAL /* Transfers and subsidies score */,
  "government_enterprises_investment" REAL /* Government enterprises and investment score */,
  "protection_property_rights" INTEGER /* Protection of property rights score */,
  "money_growth" REAL /* Money growth score */,
  "labor_market_regulations" INTEGER /* Labor market regulations score */,
  "hiring_firing_regulations" INTEGER /* Hiring and firing regulations score */,
  "starting_business" INTEGER /* Score for starting a business */,
  "business_regulations" INTEGER /* Business regulations score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gender_equality" REAL /* Gender equality score */,
  "healthcare_quality" REAL /* Healthcare quality score */,
  "education_quality" REAL /* Education quality score */,
  "cultural_diversity" REAL /* Cultural diversity score */,
  "social_welfare_spending" REAL /* Social welfare spending score */,
  "social_mobility" REAL /* Social mobility score */,
  "access_to_education" REAL /* Access to education score */,
  "access_to_healthcare" REAL /* Access to healthcare score */,
  "access_to_clean_water" REAL /* Access to clean water score */,
  "access_to_electricity" REAL /* Access to electricity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_and_society" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "laws_regulations_media_content" INTEGER /* Score for laws and regulations that influence media content */,
  "women_security_safety" INTEGER /* Score for women's security and safety */,
  "criminal_justice" INTEGER /* Score for criminal justice system */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "press_freedom_index" REAL /* Press freedom index score */,
  "internet_freedom_index" REAL /* Internet freedom index score */,
  "censorship_level" REAL /* Censorship level score */,
  "public_trust_in_media" REAL /* Public trust in media score */,
  "media_concentration" REAL /* Media concentration score */,
  "public_protests" INTEGER /* Number of public protests */,
  "rule_of_law" REAL /* Rule of law score */,
  "corruption_perception_index" REAL /* Corruption perception index score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "country_access" TEXT /* Countries the user has access to (comma-separated list) */,
  "data_access_level" TEXT /* Data access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Amount of data accessed in bytes */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
